mapper.sql: CASE WHEN e.status = 'draft' THEN 'draft' WHEN e.status = 'cancelled' THEN 'cancelled' WHEN NOW() < e.signup_deadline THEN 'signup_open' WHEN NOW() >= e.signup_deadline AND NOW() < e.start_time THEN 'signup_closed' WHEN NOW() >= e.start_time AND NOW() < e.end_time THEN 'ongoing' ELSE 'finished' END
